description: baseline SimpleCNN lr1e-3 bs64 do0.3 wd1e-4 pat20 - high variance across folds (3 negative: S01 S02 S05), S05 catastrophic -0.99, mean_best_epoch=31 suggests early stopping kicks fast

lr 1e-3 -> 5e-4 - modest mean improvement (+0.017), best_epoch doubled (61 vs 31) so more training happens, std similar, 4 negative folds (S01 S02 S05 S13). S05 got worse (-1.42) but S06 improved +0.22, S13 regressed. pooled r2 dropped slightly
grad_clip=1.0 - hurt significantly (-0.21 mean), std exploded, S05 worse -1.91, S12 regressed +0.46->+0.01. Over-constrains updates. Revert
dropout 0.3 -> 0.5 - too strong; S05 worse -1.75, S13 regressed to -0.50, pooled drops. Revert
wd 1e-4 -> 1e-3 - S05 still catastrophic -1.75, S13 to -0.25. Too much L2 regularization

SmoothL1/Huber loss beta=20 instead of MSE - robust to outlier folds (S05, S13 have labels far from train mean). Std cut 0.63->0.43, S05 -1.42->-0.78, mean r2 +0.013->+0.061. Clear win from robust loss.
Huber beta 20 -> 10 - marginal +0.006. S05 improved to -0.63, but S02 slipped to -0.06 and S13 worse -0.48. Mostly within noise but barely passes monotonic rule
Huber beta 10 -> 5 - too L1. S05 regressed -0.63->-1.43. Beta=10 seems the sweet spot
Gaussian noise std=0.1 augmentation - mixed: S13 jumped -0.48->+0.12, but S05 worse -0.63->-1.66. Noise=0.1 too strong
CosineAnnealingLR T_max=epochs eta_min=lr*0.01 - std better (0.44->0.49 wait) actually worse std; mean 0.043 < 0.067 best. Close but not an improvement
dropout 0.3 -> 0.4 - std best so far 0.37, pooled 0.61 also best, but mean 0.048 < 0.067 best. Monotonic rule: discard (tradeoff interesting though)
patience 20 -> 40 (more training budget). Tiny gain +0.003. S01 improved +0.02->+0.10, S05 stable -0.76, others similar. Barely monotonic but within rules.
halve conv channels 32/64/128->16/32/64 (28k vs 98k params). S05 catastrophic -2.00, though S13 improved +0.12. Too little capacity.
bs 64 -> 128. Trains much longer (ep 126 vs 58), S05 worse -1.20. bs=64 noise seems beneficial here
Mixup alpha=0.2 - BIG WIN. mean +0.067->+0.134, std best 0.35, S05 -0.76->-0.33, S13 -0.29->-0.35. Mixup interpolates sample+label, expands effective label coverage.
mixup alpha 0.2 -> 0.4 - too much blending, S05 reverts -0.33->-0.76. Sweet spot near 0.2
mixup alpha 0.2 -> 0.1 - less mixing reverts gain. alpha=0.2 sweet spot confirmed
dropout 0.3 -> 0.2 with mixup. S05 regressed to -0.82. Keep dropout 0.3
mixup 0.2 -> 0.3 - slightly worse. (also added matplotlib Agg backend to fix crash). alpha=0.2 remains best
lr 5e-4 -> 3e-4 (with mixup). Slower convergence, S13 crashed -0.56. Lower LR hurts
lr 5e-4 -> 7e-4. S13 worse -0.38. Higher LR also hurts. 5e-4 is sweet spot

log1p target transform - CATASTROPHIC. expm1 amplifies log-space errors for S05/S12/S13 (high-mean subjects). Also fails sanity 4+ neg folds. Train log predictions stuck near log(train_mean) => expm1 underestimates high subjects wildly
Remove SE blocks (in extract_features only). S13 bad -0.58. SE helps; keep it
wd 1e-4 -> 3e-4 with mixup. S05 worse -1.03, S13 -0.44. WD hurts with mixup
patience 40 -> 60. S10 trained to ep 261 (max reached), S05 got worse -1.20. Longer training hurt S05. Keep patience=40
Gaussian noise 0.05 + mixup - hurts. Model must already be implicitly regularized by mixup
ReLU -> GELU - borderline (+0.121 vs +0.134). Pooled actually better 0.647 but mean slightly worse. S13 improved +0.11 but S07 regressed. Strict rule: discard
ReduceLROnPlateau factor 0.5 patience 10. LR decays too aggressively; S05 -1.94 catastrophic. Adaptive sched traps model in poor region
bs 64 -> 32. std best ever 0.34, S05 better -0.58, S13 closer 0. Mean 0.107 < 0.134 best. Close tradeoff
first kernel 15 -> 25. Hurts; S05 -1.60 and S13 -0.76 catastrophic. Keep kernel 15
Adam -> AdamW. No win; S13 -0.26 still. Close to Adam baseline
Test-time augmentation K=5 noise 0.05 during training eval - hurt. Val_r2 becomes noisier, early stop worse
per-sample mixup - too aggressive. Standard per-batch mixup wins
wider model 32/64/128 -> 48/96/192 (98k->210k params). BIG WIN: +0.134 -> +0.164. S13 -0.35 -> -0.18, S12 +0.49 -> +0.61, S10 +0.43 -> +0.61. With mixup regularizing more capacity pays off
wider + mixup 0.2 -> 0.3. S05 -0.50 regressed. mixup 0.2 remains sweet spot
wider + dropout 0.3 -> 0.4. S05 worse -0.62, S13 -0.31. Over-regularizes
wider + avg+max pool concat. Catastrophic early-stop on multiple folds (ep 3). Max pool unstable for regression
wider + lr 5e-4 -> 7e-4. Small regression. 5e-4 still optimal
wider + lr 3e-4. Too slow. S05 -1.22 catastrophic. 5e-4 optimal
wider + bs 64 -> 128. S05 -1.26 very bad. Keep bs=64
wider + huber beta 10 -> 20. S13 improved +0.05 but S05 worse -0.97. Beta=10 remains optimal with wider
wider + huber beta 5. Too L1. S12 regressed. Beta=10 optimal
wider + 5-epoch LR warmup. std best-ever 0.32, S05 -0.33 tied, but mean 0.154 < 0.164 best
wider + mixup 0.25. S05 -1.11 back to bad. Seed-sensitive. 0.2 is the sweet spot
wider + cosine LR (eta_min=lr*0.1). S05 -0.68. Minor tradeoff but mean below best
wider + SE reduction 4 -> 2. S05 regressed -1.07. Default reduction=4 optimal
wider + patience 40 -> 30. S05 -0.89 worse. pat=40 wins
EMA per-batch decay=0.995 on model weights, eval uses EMA. HUGE WIN: +0.164 -> +0.225. std best 0.31, pooled best 0.69. S05 -0.39 -> -0.13, S13 -0.18 -> -0.06. All folds within sanity
EMA decay 0.995 -> 0.999 per-batch. HUGE WIN again: +0.225 -> +0.274. std 0.25 best ever, pooled 0.72 best. S05 now POSITIVE +0.23! Only S13 slightly neg -0.02. Longer training needed (ep 119 vs 70)
Remove mixup (alpha 0.2 -> 0) with EMA. HUGE WIN: +0.274 -> +0.306. ALL 8 FOLDS POSITIVE for first time. std best 0.24, pooled best 0.75. Mixup was hurting - EMA alone sufficient
Simplify: Huber -> MSE with EMA. S05 regressed -0.43, S12 +0.08. Huber still needed
EMA + patience 40 -> 60. S13 improved +0.28 -> +0.45, but S05/S01 regressed. pat=40 wins
EMA + dropout 0.3 -> 0.2. S05 crashed -0.74. Dropout still needed
EMA + wider 48/96/192 -> 64/128/256 (362k params). HUGE WIN: +0.306 -> +0.358. S05 jumped +0.17 -> +0.62! All 8 positive, std 0.25, pooled best 0.79. Wider + EMA combo is key
Even wider 80/160/320 (556k). S05 +0.19 regressed. 64/128/256 sweet spot
Wider+EMA + lr 5e-4 -> 3e-4. S13 crashed -0.25. 5e-4 optimal
Wider+EMA + lr 5e-4 -> 7e-4. S05 slipped +0.14. 5e-4 optimal
EMA decay 0.999 -> 0.9975. S05 -0.24. Decay=0.999 optimal
EMA decay 0.999 -> 0.9985. S05 -0.19. Decay=0.999 optimal
Wider+EMA + dropout 0.3 -> 0.35. Very close (0.349 vs 0.358), std best 0.23. S13 +0.45 best for S13!
Wider+EMA + dropout 0.3 -> 0.25. Worse. dropout=0.3 optimal
Wider+EMA + Gaussian noise 0.02. Close +0.343 vs +0.358, all positive, std 0.23 tied best. Marginal below target
Wider+EMA + SE reduction 4 -> 8. S05 +0.09 regressed. SE=4 optimal
MLP head 256 -> 64 -> 1 (added hidden layer). Worse. Linear head is optimal
Add 4th conv block (deeper, 593k params). S05 crashed -0.55, S06 near 0. Too deep
EMA decay 0.999 -> 0.9995. Too slow EMA; S01 stopped at ep1 r2=-3, S02 same. Convergence issue for small folds
